use_cases: Tab navigation in SaaS dashboards and admin interfaces
Section switching in settings and profile pages
Page section navigation with smooth transitions
Category filtering in e-commerce product listings
ai_summary: A magnetic tab navigation component featuring smooth spring-physics animations that move an indicator between tabs. Built with framer-motion for fluid motion, it tracks active and hovered states to create a magnetic effect where the indicator follows tabs with elastic easing. The component composes a Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger pattern with custom motion logic for the sliding indicator.
